productDisplayName: Rockport Men Drsp Wingtip Brown Formal Shoes
description: Slip into laidback comfort with these Wingtip shoes. Coming from rockport's DresSports series, these shoes feature an exquisite upper crafted from rich leather with stitch detailing and small cutouts. Engineered with adidas AdiPRENE technology, this shoe offers all-day cushioning comfort making it a great buy. Upper Full-grain leather upper for added strength and durability Stitch detailing and overlays with cutouts for better style Padded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistering Lace-ups for a snug Fit Perforated tongue for greater breathability Brand logo embedded behind the collar Midsole Highly shock-absorbent adiPRENE technology infused cushioning protects the heel on impact for all day cushioned comfort Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption thereby reducing foot fatigue truWALK Architecute on the outsole for better comfort Flex grooves provide flexibility in foot movement Shoe care Use a leather brush to dust off the dirt Use a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shine Do not store in direct sunlight
